creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'd love to use LIB_DEPENDS, but we need to have requirement on a particular versions of ports we are depend on. Hence, I use combination of BUILD|RUN_DEPENDS.

I've moved those dependencies to the top of Makefile, that should address the problem, please verify.

I vaguely remember that that was the case initially, but seems, those dependencies were moved later with additional fixes to the port.
